title: senecio multibracteatus
intro: Senecio multibracteatus, also known as the many-bracted groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Senecio multibracteatus include treating fever, digestive issues, and skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Senecio multibracteatus typically involve infusions or decoctions of the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed as teas or applied topically as poultices.
